mapper.select: SELECT ADMIN_ID, LOGIN_ID, CRYPTPACK.DECRYPT(PASSWORD, '12341234') AS PASSWORD FROM ADMIN_ACCOUNT WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CAFE) AS "totalCafeCount", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER_ACCOUNT) AS "totalMemberCount", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ROOM) AS "totalThemeCount" FROM DUAL
SELECT * FROM VW_CAFE_DETAIL ORDER BY CAFE_ID DESC
